title: Mould King V8 Engine Building Blocks Sets, 10171 MOC Scale Model Kit with Battery and Motor, Collectible Set for Adults, Construction Toys for Teens(487 Pcs)
features: 【Classic Engine Scale Model】Mould King V8 Engine set contains many realistic details. Such as transparent cylinder head, simulate piston motion, Turbocharger. Designed specifically for race car fans. The perfect gift for car lovers and future engineers!

【Transparent Cylinder Head Design】V8 model engine kit is powered by the equipped battery and reproduces the dynamic principle for you 1:1. Through the transparent cylinder cover, the movement of the piston can be observed.

【MOC V8 Engine】Mould King V8 Engine building block kits is assembled from 487 building block parts and has colorful paper instructions to help you easily assemble it. This building block kit compatible with mainstream building blocks. All parts are easy to assemble and will not fall apart.

【Premium Quality Material】Mould King V8 Engine Kits made from ABS materials and tested for quality control to ensure compliance with safety standards. No smell, no burr, smooth and eco-friendly. You can assemble with confidence and safety.

【Toys for Adults 】Mould King building sets are the best for people to recreate scenes from the dream up their own original stories. And it is a good collection. For any occasion such as New Years Day, Christmas, Birthday, Easter, Halloween, Chanukkah, STEM, Summer Camp Activities, Back To School.
description: Product Description Mould King V8 Engine Building Blocks Set - 487 PCS
